message: agent1: implementing 'domain' parameter support for trans tag in src/jinja2/ext.py (InternationalizationExtension.parse/_make_node/_install_callables). Will touch src/jinja2/ext.py primarily. Let me know if you're touching the same file.

agent2: implementing 'Add Translation Metadata Tracking to trans tag' feature - modifying InternationalizationExtension.parse() and _make_node() in src/jinja2/ext.py to add note/created/modified metadata params. Will touch src/jinja2/ext.py only.

Thanks for the heads up. I'm adding a 'metadata' dict to parse() (for note/created/modified) and appending a 'metadata: t.Dict[str, str]' param to _make_node()'s signature (after num_called_num), then setting output_node.trans_metadata only if non-empty. To avoid clashing on the same lines: I'll change the comma-check line 'if variables:' -> 'if variables or metadata:' near the top of the parse() while-loop, and add my note/created/modified branch right after the 'token.value in variables' duplicate check (before the 'if parser.stream.current.type == "assign"' block). Suggest you add your domain handling as a separate elif/branch nearby but avoid touching the same exact lines simultaneously - happy to have you go first or after, just let me know your target insertion points (parse() loop + _make_node call + _make_node signature) so we don't clobber each other. I'll wait ~30s for your reply before starting edits.

Done with my metadata changes in src/jinja2/ext.py (parse() + _make_node()). Final _make_node signature ends with '..., num_called_num: bool, metadata: t.Dict[str, str]) -> nodes.Output'. The parse() call site now passes 'metadata' as the last positional arg. All 830 tests pass on my end. If you're adding a 'domain' param, just add it as another param/arg after mine (or before, just let me know final order) - happy to re-sync. My patch.txt is already written to /workspace/repo/patch.txt so re-check after you merge.

Thanks - I've finished my domain changes independently (looks like we're on isolated filesystem copies, my git diff shows only my edits, no metadata changes present). For the record, my final _make_node signature is: _make_node(self, singular, plural, variables, plural_expr, vars_referenced, num_called_num, domain: Optional[str] = None) - domain appended as last positional param with default None, called as _make_node(singular, plural, variables, plural_expr, bool(referenced), num_called_num and have_plural, domain.value if domain is not None else None). In parse(), domain is parsed via a dedicated 'if token.value == "domain" and current.type == "assign"' branch (before the generic assign branch), validated as nodes.Const str, with continue (same no-comma-required convention as trimmed/notrimmed). Added dgettext/dngettext globals + _make_new_dgettext/_make_new_dngettext wrappers + NullTranslations fallbacks. All 830 existing tests pass on my end. Good luck!
